name: Impossible Ham Salad Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 package Peas; frozen, 10 oz size          1/2 cup Mayonnaise
1 cup Ham; finely chopped cooked      1 1/2 tablespoons Mustard; prepared
1 cup Cheddar cheese; shredded          3/4 cup Bisquick baking mix
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. Lightly grease pie plate, 10" x 1-1/2". Rinse peas under cold water to separate and drain them.
Sprinkle the peas, ham, and cheese in the pie plate.
Beat remaining ingredients together until smooth: 15 seconds in a blender on high speed or 1 minute with a hand beater. Pour into the pie plate.
Bake until golden brown and a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean, about 30 to 35 minutes. Let stand for 5 minutes before cutting.
